Name: Spliffings Bag
Notes: 1l Blue dry bag with see-through window with Spliffings written on the side in Sharpie

Name: Timbuk2 Waist Pack
Notes: Black waist bag with 2 locking carabiners. Pairs with Rush 24 for multi-day travel as quick-access hip bag. Holds camera, iPad, art tools, action cam.

Name: XPro-3
Notes: Grail camera. EVF/OVF hybrid viewfinder with preview window is ideal shooting style - perfect ergonomics. Dial quirks (shutter indent lock, ISO pull-dial) are lovable eccentricities. Bought from B&H after XT1 was stolen from car in Brooklyn - a testament to my love of photography, starting again from scratch. With handgrip, custom shutter button, 23mm f/2 lens.

Name: Small Packtowel
Notes: Multi-use: camera lens cleaning + spill cleanup + cooling cloth + food prep

Name: Large Packtowel
Notes: Body towel for swimming/bathing + ground cloth for resting

Name: Matador Ground Blanket
Notes: Ultralight packable ground sheet for sitting anywhere

Name: Small Watercolor Notebook
Notes: Leuchtturm or Hahnemuhle cotton paper. Watercolor captures color while camera handles B&W, shapes, composition, light - complementary tools. Sketches landscapes and big things, photos for near/medium. The 15-20 min drying time forces presence - good for lunch breaks or end-of-day memory capture. Sometimes quick field sketches get watercolor fills later.

Name: Spare Fujifilm Battery
Notes: 4x NP-W126S spare batteries for XPro-3

Name: Pentel Watercolor Brush
Notes: Aquash water brush - squeeze barrel feeds water to tip. Part of field sketching kit with notebook and pencil. No need to carry water container, just refill barrel.

Name: General's Sketching Pencil
Notes: Woodless graphite for quick field sketches - outlines and values before watercolor washes. Soft enough for expressive marks, durable enough to survive the bag.

Name: CRKT Small Fixed Knife
Notes: Emergency always-on-vest knife. Treasured, packable, concealable. Perfect around camp - the utility blade while the Lionsteel stays pristine for finer work.

Name: Hankerchief
Notes: Classic multi-tool. Sweat, spills, impromptu napkin, camera wipe backup.

Name: GE Microcassette Recorder
Notes: Analog recorder. Needs batteries and repair.

Name: Medical Shears
Notes: Trauma shears for cutting through clothing and materials in emergency medical situations

Name: iPhone 15 Pro Max
Notes: The perfect phone. Titanium for life. Close-up video/photo when Fuji handles composition work.

Name: Aroundsquare Titanium Begleri
Notes: Meditative fidget. Has held me together in difficult times - use it to think. Adult evolution from years of balisong trainers: simpler, more interesting, without the weird violent implications. Silk paracord.

Name: North Face Circaloft Booties
Notes: All-time favorite item. Worn basically anytime at home. Insulated camp booties that are impossibly cozy.

Name: Naked & Famous Cashmere Blend Jeans
Notes: Former daily wear. Cashmere blend was perfect warmth and comfort. Huge crotch rip — needs heavy surgery and donor fabric. Replaced by Fjallraven Kebs.

Name: Fjallraven Keb Trousers
Notes: Heavier daily pants. G-1000 fabric with stretch panels. More durable/rugged of the two Kebs.

Name: Fjallraven Keb Agile Trousers
Notes: Lighter version of the Kebs. More breathable and packable for warmer weather or active days.

Name: Mosko Moto Woodsman Pants
Notes: Perfect ADV pants for motorcycling, camping, and short hikes - same pants over weeks and huge weather changes. Layer with down pants underneath in cold, vents wide open in heat. Schoeller waterproof knees/seat, stretchy everywhere.

Name: North Face Circaloft Hoodie
Notes: Former EDC mid-layer - zipper broke after a year of hard wear. Replaced by Cerium + AirMesh combo.

Name: Arc'teryx Cerium Hoody
Notes: EDC down jacket. Upgraded from Circaloft after zipper failure. Paired with AirMesh for ultralight 30-65F coverage.

Name: Mountain Hardwear AirMesh Hoody
Notes: Active insulation layer. Paired with Cerium for great ultralight combo covering 30-65F. Breathes while moving.

Name: Gildan Cotton Hoodie
Notes: Done with cotton — moved to technical fabrics.

Name: Uniqlo Airism Boxer Briefs
Notes: Breathable, moisture-wicking daily wear. The standard.

Name: Moletta Lionsteel Folding Black Knife
Notes: Work of art acquired at a treasured Portland Maine knife shop. Does for me what a Rolex does for some - deep pleasure in USING this perfectly shaped steel daily. Back pocket of jeans at all times (except in city). Window breaker tip kept handy while riding for emergency egress.

Name: Arcteryx Rho Gloves
Notes: Lightweight merino wool liner gloves for cold weather layering and dexterity

Name: Nike ACG Air Zoom Gaiadome GORE-TEX Shoes
Notes: Waterproof hiking boots with urban style and all-terrain traction

Name: 5.11 Rush 24 Backpack
Notes: Multi-day travel + motorcycle bag. Pairs with Timbuk2 waist pack for overnight trips. Holds modular systems (sleep, coffee). MOLLE tie-downs are key for bungee-strapping to bike at speed. Encourages overpacking for city use — that's a feature for camping/moto where extra weight matters less.

Name: WLF Enduro Pack Vest
Notes: Daily carry. Upgraded from basic Herschel - weight transfers to hips (crucial for motorcycle), has hydration carrier room. Also it's fucking sick.

Name: TIDRADIO TD-H3
Notes: Primary radio. Scanner for local emergency services (situational awareness), receives local repeaters, GMRS mode bridges to friends with consumer walkie talkies. dual-band VHF/UHF analog, USB-C. (Corrected: TIDRADIO TD-H3, analog-only — no DMR/GPS.)

Name: Baofeng UV-5R with extended antenna
Notes: Replaced by TYT TD-H3 as daily radio.

Name: Motorcycle Repair Tools + Tire Plug Kit
Notes: Lives on back of WLF vest. OEM kit from Versys X 300 plus extra parts sized for the bike, tire plug kit, paracord, zip ties. Roadside self-rescue.

Name: Sherpa 100AC Battery
Notes: Emergency power for home outages and prep

Name: 5.11 Rush 72 Backpack
Notes: Large wilderness/bugout bag. Mostly in storage — would shine on a multi-night hike-out camping trip. Hasn't seen as much use as hoped.

Name: Fiskars Hatchet
Notes: Wilderness survival tool for hiking/bushcraft

Name: Large LED Light
Notes: LED flashlight for emergency lighting

Name: Workright Gloves
Notes: Work gloves for protection

Name: Trail Marking Tape
Notes: Wilderness navigation and marking

Name: Black 20L Big River Dry Bag
Notes: Modular sleep system - transfers between Rush 24/72 (Brand corrected: Big River is a Sea to Summit product, not NRS.)

Name: Nemo Pillow
Notes: Inflatable camp pillow

Name: Silk Bag Liner
Notes: All that's needed on hot nights. Layer with Reactor liner + bag for super warm and comfy in cold.

Name: Nemo Quasar 3D Regular Wide Insulated Sleeping Pad
Notes: Insulated sleeping pad for 3-season camping

Name: Aerogogo Gigapump
Notes: Tiny electric pump for sleeping pad. Also doubles as bellows to stoke stubborn fires.

Name: Sleeping Pad Inflator Bag
Notes: Stuff sack for inflating sleeping pad without moisture from breath

Name: REI Magma 30 Sleeping Bag
Notes: Ultralight down sleeping bag rated to 30F for three-season backpacking

Name: Reactor Insulated Bag Liner
Notes: Adds serious warmth. Silk liner + Reactor + bag = super warm and comfy layered sleep system for cold nights.

Name: Emergency Overnight Clothes Bag
Notes: Blue dry bag with window. Emergency go-bag change of clothes: Smartwool underwear, outdoor shirt, socks. Easy to pop into any bag for overnight capability. Hanging in bathroom.

Name: Dopp Kit
Notes: Full kit lives in bathroom now. Travel hygiene simplified to just toothbrush, toothpaste, deodorant, travel cologne — no full dopp kit needed.

Name: First Aid Kit Dry Bag
Notes: First aid supplies in waterproof dry bag

Name: Art Tools Case
Notes: Physical watercolor/art supplies case. Waiting for a settled spot to get back into watercolors.

Name: Orange Ultra-sil 1L Dry Bag
Notes: Small orange dry bag formerly used as travel dopp/toiletry bag.

Name: Hyperlite Cable Bag (1L)
Notes: Cables/adapters/connectors + Flipper Zero. Swaps between whatever bag is active — goes everywhere the laptop goes.

Name: DJI Action 5 Camera
Notes: Set-and-forget video. High res, big SD card, extensible mounting. Put it somewhere and let it run for wide/establishing shots. Close work handled by iPhone or Fuji video mode.

Name: Power Bag (Black 2L)
Notes: Anker Prime 100W 3-port GaN charger (foldable) + Anker 6ft 2-in-1 USB-C 140W cable. Charges phone + MacBook or phone + iPad off one outlet. Tiny and lightweight EDC power kit.

Name: Mosko Reckless 80 Pannier System
Notes: Mosko Moto Reckless 80L rackless luggage system. Dual side panniers + 22L Stinger tail bag. One 25L window dry bag surviving (other rotted). 800D Nylon/TPU construction.

Name: Mosko 25L Window Dry Bag
Notes: Surviving leg dry bag from Reckless 80. Clear window panel, blue interior, 800D Nylon/TPU. Currently holds tent + fly.

Name: Marmot Tungsten 2P Tent
Notes: Standard tent + footprint + fly + stakes. Modular camping shelter system.

Name: Mosko Tent Pole Drybag
Notes: Lightweight drybag specifically for tent poles. Straps to motorcycle separately from tent body.

Name: Camping Grill
Notes: Ultralight foldable grill for cooking over rocks and open flames

Name: Excedrin
Notes: Pain reliever tablets for headaches and general pain management (depleted 2026-06 — restock)

Name: Small Tripod + iPhone Holder
Notes: Compact aluminum tripod with phone mount for stable photography and video recording

Name: Nidra Sleep Mask
Notes: Contoured 3D eye mask with deep cups for complete light blocking without eye pressure

Name: Zumo XT GPS
Notes: Rugged 5.5 motorcycle GPS with weather-resistant display and adventure routing. Charging and waiting for longer trips.

Name: Zippo Handwarmer
Notes: Catalytic fuel-powered hand warmer. Lost somewhere in storage.

Name: Coffee Kit
Notes: Carabiner-attached modular coffee system with espresso container

Name: Aeropress Go
Notes: Portable espresso press with Brother metal filter adapter - no disposable filters needed

Name: Jetboil
Notes: Compact canister stove system for fast water boiling in field conditions (Buy link assumed Jetboil Flash — verify your model.)

Name: DJI Mic 3 System
Notes: Wireless lav mic system with charging case and receiver. Interview/journalism ready. Should be in media bag more often.

Name: Hyperlite 3L Zippy
Notes: 3L DCF media pouch. Holds lavs, GoPro, iPhone gimbal. Grab-and-go when shooting.

Name: DJI Osmo Mobile 6
Notes: Foldable 3-axis iPhone gimbal. ActiveTrack AI subject tracking via DJI Mimo app. Compact enough for the media bag.

Name: Anker Red Power Bank
Notes: Lost/sidelined 2026-06 (USB-A only) — replace.

Name: Plastic Quart Espresso Container
Notes: Pre-ground espresso storage for field brewing

Name: Meshtastic Lily T-Go
Notes: Mesh networking via LoRa. Love the concept but app pairing/tracking is flaky — didn't connect on DC or Phoenix trips despite known nodes. Desk novelty for now.

Name: Miyoo Mini
Notes: Retro gaming handheld. Mostly desk use now but occasionally carried.

Name: Flipper Zero
Notes: Multi-tool for radio analysis and hardware research. Near-EDC now - keeps coming in handy.

Name: XPro-3 (Video)
Notes: Second XPro-3 body as dedicated video/vlog/b-roll camera. 56mm f/1.2 mounted daily. YouTube and studio work.

Name: iPad Mini
Notes: Fell in the bath 2026-06 — water damage. RIP.

Name: Apple Pencil (2nd Gen)
Notes: Magnetically attached to iPad Mini. Digital sketching and art.

Name: Hyperlite Daybreak 22
Notes: 22L ultralight Dyneema daypack in black. Purpose-built for putting in miles walking Manhattan with a laptop. Clamshell U-zip with orange interior. 17in laptop sleeve. Dual front zip pockets, stretch mesh front + sides, shock cord system. Forces discipline against overpacking — just laptop, hoodie, shell, water bottle. Pairs with modular small bags (cable bag, media bag) for city day trips.

Name: Mountain Hardwear Kor Alloy Tights
Notes: Fleece-backed active tight worn as daily joggers. Took over everyday duty after the cashmere jeans ripped out.

Name: Uniqlo AIRism Shorts
Notes: Breathable, moisture-wicking shorts for warm-weather daily wear.

Name: Arc'teryx Atom Hoody
Notes: Synthetic insulated hoody (Spotlight colorway). Warmer, more weather-tough active-insulation layer than the Cerium down — good for 30-60F moving cold.

Name: Bell Race Star Flex DLX Helmet
Notes: Carbon fiber. ProTint photochromic shield + Sena 10C comms/camera. Bell Race Star Flex DLX (carbon).

Name: Sena 10C
Notes: Helmet Bluetooth comms + built-in camera (microSD). Charge AND clear card before trips. Original 10C: Micro-USB port.

Name: Alpinestars Halo Jacket
Notes: ADV riding shell, Drystar waterproof.

Name: Forma Tall ADV Boots
Notes: Tall adventure riding boots. VERIFY waterproof (Adventure vs Adventure Dry model).

Name: Fox Orange Gloves
Notes: Warm-weather riding gloves (default). Cold/aggressive alt: Knox Handroid.

Name: Knox Handroid Gauntlets
Notes: Armored gauntlet gloves. Alt to Fox for cold/aggressive riding. VERIFY waterproof.

Name: Hanes Quick-Dri Jersey Shirt
Notes: White quick-dry base layer under the riding jacket.

Name: Steam Deck
Notes: Primary carry handheld (OLED) — took over from the desk-bound Miyoo Mini for trips.
